summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) HR & Organizational Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in insights, and partnering with leaders and stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can strengthen organizational effectiveness, engagement, and the people experience—through human-centered, systematic approaches.

bullets.text: Facilitate CEO/HR discovery interviews to diagnose absenteeism, then {data|upskill HR} to audit 300+ leave cases—surfacing $362K in costs driving policy redesigns
Conduct focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to surface decision-making and {cross|accountability} gaps
Supported HRBP team in HR solutions across {ex|employee relations}, headcount, and succession planning, partnering with leaders on business priorities
Facilitated organizational change by directing a Mergers & Acquisitions project, overseeing {cross|cross-functional stakeholders}
Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Optimized onboarding across 3 global locations via process analysis; drove award-winning engagement among 1,000+ competitors
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to {data|identify trends} and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Conduct needs assessments with 25+ global {cross|stakeholders} to identify learning gaps and design 3 new programs
Develop guides and workflows for 70+ {cross|cross-functional} staff, improving knowledge and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, enhancing {prog|program understanding} and engagement
Manage 20+ programs and 10+ vendors, refining positioning, delivery strategy, and operations via {data|feedback analysis}
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated C-suite panels at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
